title: T-003 — shift_configs + oee_alert_thresholds reference tables DDL + RLS (OEE §9.4, 02-SET §8.1)
prompt:
# T-003 — shift_configs + oee_alert_thresholds reference tables

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §9.4, §11 V-OEE-SHIFT-1..4 (24h coverage, no overlap, valid IANA tz)
Cross-PRD: docs/prd/02-SETTINGS-PRD.md §8.1 (reference tables registry)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create two reference tables consumed by the OEE shift aggregator and thresholding: `shift_configs` (per-tenant shift definitions) and `oee_alert_thresholds` (per-line + per-tenant default targets). Both follow the 02-SETTINGS §8.1 reference-tables pattern (RLS, R13 audit, org_id NOT NULL, optional site_id REC-L1).

## Pre-flight schema check
Read `packages/db/migrations/` for: (a) latest migration number, (b) presence of `app.current_org_id()` (Wave1 T-125), (c) presence of `site_user_access` (14-multi-site). Read `docs/prd/02-SETTINGS-PRD.md §8.1` to align with reference-table pattern (registry row, viewer screen integration).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_a_shift_configs_thresholds.sql` creating:
   - `shift_configs` per PRD §9.4 DDL with `org_id UUID NOT NULL`, `site_id UUID NULL` REC-L1, `shift_id TEXT`, `shift_label TEXT`, `start_time TIME NOT NULL`, `end_time TIME NOT NULL`, `timezone TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UTC'` (IANA validated by Zod at write time per V-OEE-SHIFT-4), `active_days TEXT[] DEFAULT ARRAY['mon','tue','wed','thu','fri','sat','sun']`, `sort_order INT NOT NULL`, `is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE`, R13 audit cols, `UNIQUE(org_id, shift_id)`.
   - `oee_alert_thresholds` per PRD §9.4: `org_id UUID NOT NULL`, `site_id UUID NULL`, `line_id TEXT NULL` (NULL=tenant default), `oee_target_pct NUMERIC(5,2) DEFAULT 70.00`, `availability_min_pct DEFAULT 70.00`, `performance_min_pct DEFAULT 80.00`, `quality_min_pct DEFAULT 95.00`, `anomaly_alpha NUMERIC(3,2) DEFAULT 0.30`, `anomaly_sigma_threshold NUMERIC(3,1) DEFAULT 2.0`, `maintenance_trigger_threshold_pct DEFAULT 70.00`, `maintenance_trigger_consecutive_days INT DEFAULT 3`, R13 audit cols, `UNIQUE(org_id, line_id)`.
2. ENABLE+FORCE RLS; policy `<table>_org_site` USING (`org_id = app.current_org_id() AND (site_id IS NULL OR site_id IN (SELECT site_id FROM site_user_access WHERE user_id = auth.uid()))`) WITH CHECK same.
3. Insert `shift_configs` + `oee_alert_thresholds` rows into 02-SETTINGS `reference_tables_registry` (or equivalent metadata table) so 02-SETTINGS §8.1 viewer can list them (read-only from 02-SET; writes via OEE-ADM-002/003 — T-021/T-022).
4. Drizzle schemas `packages/db/src/schema/oee/shift-configs.ts` and `packages/db/src/schema/oee/alert-thresholds.ts` with typed Insert/Select.
5. Vitest covering: (a) RLS isolation across two orgs, (b) UNIQUE constraints, (c) policy text references `app.current_org_id()` not GUC, (d) defaults applied when omitted.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_a_shift_configs_thresholds.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/oee/shift-configs.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/oee/alert-thresholds.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/oee-a-shift-configs-thresholds.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration runs, when `\d shift_configs` and `\d oee_alert_thresholds` are read, then columns match PRD §9.4 with org_id NOT NULL, site_id UUID NULL, R13 audit cols, UNIQUE(org_id, shift_id) and UNIQUE(org_id, line_id), and RLS+FORCE RLS enabled on both.
2. Given two orgs and `app.set_org_context`, when SELECT runs in each session, then RLS isolation holds and policy text references `app.current_org_id()` (no `current_setting()` GUC reads).
3. Given an `oee_alert_thresholds` row inserted with only `(org_id, line_id)`, when fetched, then defaults `70.00/70.00/80.00/95.00/0.30/2.0/70.00/3` are applied.
4. Given the 02-SETTINGS reference_tables_registry is queried, when filtered for OEE namespace, then both new tables are listed.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest oee-a-shift-configs-thresholds asserting all four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test oee-a-shift-configs-thresholds`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not name business column tenant_id; use org_id.
- Do not read current_setting() GUC; use app.current_org_id().
- Do not enforce IANA timezone via CHECK constraint — V-OEE-SHIFT-4 validates server-side via Zod (Postgres has no built-in IANA list).
- Do not couple this task to UI (T-020/T-021/T-022).
- Do not skip the 02-SETTINGS registry insert — OEE-ADM-002 viewer depends on it.

pipeline_inputs.description: Create shift_configs + oee_alert_thresholds reference tables with RLS via app.current_org_id() + site_user_access, R13 audit, Drizzle schemas, vitest. Register in 02-SETTINGS §8.1 reference_tables_registry.
pipeline_inputs.details: Both tables are 02-SETTINGS reference-table pattern but lifecycle-owned by 15-OEE writers (T-021/T-022). 02-SETTINGS exposes read-only viewer rows. shift_configs feeds shift_aggregator_v1 (T-008); oee_alert_thresholds feeds dashboards (T-014..T-019) and anomaly/maintenance triggers (T-023 stubs). Defaults reflect PRD §9.4 verbatim. V-OEE-SHIFT validators 1-4 are implemented in the writer Server Actions (T-021/T-022), not as DB CHECK constraints (24h coverage + overlap detection are multi-row invariants).
out_of_scope: Do not create MV tables here (T-006, T-007)
Do not write Server Actions for OEE-ADM-001/002/003 (T-021/T-022)
Do not enforce IANA tz via CHECK constraint
acceptance_criteria: Given migration runs, when \d shift_configs and \d oee_alert_thresholds are read, then columns match PRD §9.4 with org_id NOT NULL, site_id NULL, R13 audit cols, UNIQUE(org_id, shift_id) and UNIQUE(org_id, line_id), RLS+FORCE RLS enabled
Given app.set_org_context for two orgs, when SELECT runs as app_user, then RLS isolation holds and policy text references app.current_org_id()
Given an oee_alert_thresholds row inserted with only (org_id, line_id), when fetched, then PRD §9.4 defaults are applied (70/70/80/95/0.30/2.0/70/3)
Given the 02-SETTINGS reference_tables_registry is queried, when filtered for OEE namespace, then both new tables are listed
test_strategy: RED: vitest oee-a-shift-configs-thresholds asserting four ACs
Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test oee-a-shift-configs-thresholds`
risk_red_lines: Do not name business column tenant_id; use org_id
Do not read current_setting() GUC; use app.current_org_id()
Do not enforce IANA tz via CHECK; validate via Zod in Server Action
